message: feat: scaffold typescript cli with list command

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+root = true
+
+[*]
+charset = utf-8
+end_of_line = lf
+indent_style = space
+indent_size = 2
+insert_final_newline = true
+trim_trailing_whitespace = true
+
+[*.md]
+trim_trailing_whitespace = false

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+[hooks.pre-commit]
+steps = [
+  { run = "npm run lint" },
+  { run = "npm run format" },
+  { run = "npm run typecheck" },
+  { run = "npm run test" }
+]

@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+{
+  "name": "codex-subagent-cli",
+  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "description": "TypeScript CLI for managing Codex subagent threads",
+  "type": "module",
+  "bin": {
+    "codex-subagent": "dist/codex-subagent.js"
+  },
+  "scripts": {
+    "build": "tsup",
+    "dev": "tsx src/bin/codex-subagent.ts",
+    "lint": "eslint .",
+    "lint:fix": "eslint . --fix",
+    "format": "prettier --check .",
+    "format:fix": "prettier --write .",
+    "test": "vitest run",
+    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
+    "prepare": "node scripts/run-prek-install.mjs"
+  },
+  "engines": {
+    "node": ">=20",
+    "npm": ">=10"
+  },
+  "devDependencies": {
+    "@types/node": "^24.10.1",
+    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^8.11.0",
+    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^8.11.0",
+    "@vitest/coverage-istanbul": "^1.6.1",
+    "chokidar": "^3.6.0",
+    "eslint": "^9.13.0",
+    "eslint-config-prettier": "^9.1.0",
+    "globals": "^16.5.0",
+    "npm-run-all": "^4.1.5",
+    "prettier": "^3.3.3",
+    "tsup": "^8.3.0",
+    "tsx": "^4.19.2",
+    "typescript": "^5.6.3",
+    "typescript-eslint": "^8.48.0",
+    "vitest": "^1.6.1"
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+import { defineConfig } from 'tsup';
+
+export default defineConfig({
+  entry: ['src/bin/codex-subagent.ts'],
+  format: ['esm', 'cjs'],
+  sourcemap: true,
+  clean: true,
+  target: 'node20',
+  outDir: 'dist',
+  splitting: false,
+  shims: false,
+  banner: { js: '#!/usr/bin/env node' },
+});
